title: Reading and Use of English – Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: Nobody had warned me about the icy roads.

questions.firstSentence: She started living abroad five years ago.
questions.explanation: Tests purpose or duration structures with 'for'.

questions.firstSentence: He is not as skilful as his colleague.
questions.explanation: Complete the gap using 'less' (e.g. 'less skilful than').

questions.firstSentence: She continued studying even after midnight.
It was impossible for them to get tickets.
questions.explanation: Complete the gap using 'unable' (e.g. 'unable to get').

questions.firstSentence: She wanted to know if he had ever visited Australia.
questions.afterGap: if he had ever visited Australia.
questions.explanation: Tests reported speech with an infinitive or question structure.

questions.firstSentence: He took up golf after he retired.
